item.description: After several days of renewed strikes on both sides, the United States and Iran are closing in on a preliminary agreement that extends the ceasefire for 60 days, begins negotiations on Iran’s nuclear program and opens the Strait of Hormuz. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: US and Iranian Negotiators Close in on Preliminary Peace Deal
media:content.media:description: After several days of renewed strikes on both sides, the United States and Iran are closing in on a preliminary agreement that extends the ceasefire for 60 days, begins negotiations on Iran’s nuclear program and opens the Strait of Hormuz. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

item.title: US and Iranian Negotiators Close in on Preliminary Peace Deal

item.description: Jeff Bezos’ Blue Origin New Glenn rocket exploded during an engine-firing test in Florida, which shook nearby homes in Cape Canaveral and Cocoa Beach. In a brief statement, Blue Origin said it "experienced an anomaly" during the test and “will provide updates” as more is learned.

media:content.media:title: Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket explodes during engine-firing test in Florida
media:content.media:description: Jeff Bezos’ Blue Origin New Glenn rocket exploded during an engine-firing test in Florida, which shook nearby homes in Cape Canaveral and Cocoa Beach. In a brief statement, Blue Origin said it "experienced an anomaly" during the test and “will provide updates” as more is learned.

item.title: Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket explodes during engine-firing test in Florida

item.dc:creator: Shiv Sudhakar, M.D.
item.description: Flu season may be mostly behind us, but levels of norovirus, the nasty, highly contagious stomach bug, are rising, according to wastewater data.

media:content.media:text: Pacific Crest trail.
media:content.media:description: Southbound hikers walk toward Pinchot Pass on the Pacific Crest Trail in California.

item.title: Vomiting virus is spreading across most of the U.S.

item.description: A drone crashed into an apartment building in Romania early Friday during a Russian attack on neighboring Ukraine. The incident is sparking a wave of alarm and condemnation from European powers and NATO. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Russian Drone Hits Romanian Apartment Block, Drawing Outrage
media:content.media:description: A drone crashed into an apartment building in Romania early Friday during a Russian attack on neighboring Ukraine. The incident is sparking a wave of alarm and condemnation from European powers and NATO. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

item.title: Russian Drone Hits Romanian Apartment Block, Drawing Outrage

item.description: In an investigative report in partnership with KFF Health News, NBC News’ Anne Thompson reports on the growing cases of overdoses involving GLP-1 weight loss drugs.

media:content.media:title: Alarming rise in weight loss drug overdoses
media:content.media:description: In an investigative report in partnership with KFF Health News, NBC News’ Anne Thompson reports on the growing cases of overdoses involving GLP-1 weight loss drugs.

item.title: Alarming rise in weight loss drug overdoses

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
Corky Siemaszko
item.description: Teenagers behaving badly in groups is hardly a new thing, experts said. But social media has made it easier to rapidly mobilize this generation of teenagers, who may be craving social interaction and looking for an outlet after having spent their formative years isolated during the Covid pandemic.

media:content.media:text: A still from a video showing 'Teen takeovers' in Chicago on Memorial Day, on May 26, 2026.
media:content.media:description: A still from a video showing 'Teen takeovers' in Chicago on Memorial Day, on May 26, 2026.

item.title: Teen ‘takeovers’ push cities to take action as experts see echoes of the Covid pandemic

item.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

media:content.media:title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
media:content.media:description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

item.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio

item.dc:creator: Minyvonne Burke
item.description: John F. Kennedy International Airport in New York City will begin Ebola screenings for passengers flying in from countries impacted in the outbreak, the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention said Thursday.

media:content.media:text: The FAA Air Traffic Control tower at John F. Kennedy International Airport (JFK) in New York on March 1, 2026.
media:content.media:description: The FAA Air Traffic Control tower at John F. Kennedy International Airport (JFK) in New York on March 1, 2026.

media:content.media:text: New York
media:content.media:description: The Manhattan skyline can be seen behind John F. Kennedy Airport in New York City.

item.title: JFK Airport will screen passengers from Ebola-stricken countries

item.dc:creator: Matt Bradley
item.description: It was the kind of sweeping, last-minute demand that would have torpedoed most diplomatic talks: President Donald Trump insisting this week that in exchange for him ending the war with Iran, several Arab and Muslim countries should sign on to his Abraham Accords to normalize their diplomatic relations with Israel.

media:content.media:text: TOPSHOT-PALESTINIAN-ISRAEL-CONFLICT-GAZA
media:content.media:description: A Palestinian boy sits at the site of an overnight Israeli military strike on structures and tents housing displaced families, killing ten Palestinians, in Gaza City on May 28, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Image: Abraham Accords signing
media:content.media:description: From left, Bahraini Foreign Minister Abdullatif al-Zayani, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, President Donald Trump and UAE Foreign Minister Abdullah bin Zayed Al-Nahyan participate in the signing of the Abraham Accords, at the White House in 2020.

media:content.media:text: U.S. And Israel Wage War Against Iran
media:content.media:description: A woman walks among buildings destroyed in a U.S.-Israeli joint attack in Tehran, Iran.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Meets With His Cabinet At The White House
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump during a Cabinet meeting at the White House on Wednesday.

item.title: Why U.S. allies aren’t taking Trump seriously after his push for Arab-Israel normalization

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
item.description: ESPN’s Mike Breen will be the play-by-play man for his record-extending 21st straight NBA Finals this year. And for the first time, the New York native will be calling the team he grew up rooting for in the championship round.

media:content.media:text: Mike Breen.
media:content.media:description: Mike Breen in Minneapolis on April 25.

media:content.media:text: Josh Hart and Jalen Brunson of the New York Knicks congratulate Walt Frazier and Mike Breen.
media:content.media:description: Mike Breen in Minneapolis on April 25.

item.title: The NBA Finals are a reward for long-suffering Knicks fans — and this broadcaster

item.dc:creator: Shiv Sudhakar, M.D.
item.description: Flu season may be mostly behind us, but levels of norovirus, the nasty, highly contagious stomach bug, are rising, according to wastewater data.

media:content.media:text: Pacific Crest trail.
media:content.media:description: Southbound hikers walk toward Pinchot Pass on the Pacific Crest Trail in California.

item.title: Vomiting virus is spreading across most of the U.S.

item.dc:creator: Alexander Smith
item.description: A Russian drone crashed into an apartment building in Romania early Friday, injuring two people and setting the building ablaze, exactly the type of spillover from the war in Ukraine that many in Europe have long feared

media:content.media:text: Fire burns on the roof of a 10-story block of flats after a drone crashed into the building in Galati
media:content.media:description: A fire burns on the roof of a 10-story block of flats after a drone crashed into the building, causing an explosion and injuring two people, near the border with Ukraine, in Galati, Romania, in this handout image released on May 29, 2026.

item.title: Russia denounced after drone hits Romanian apartment building

item.dc:creator: Jonathan Dienst
Tom Winter
Kyla Guilfoil
item.description: The commander of a terrorist organization is alleged to have discussed wanting to target Ivanka Trump, President Donald Trump’s oldest daughter, as part of a series of attacks, according to three sources familiar with the matter

media:content.media:text: Donald Trump
media:content.media:description: Ivanka Trump and Jared Kushner in West Palm Beach, Fla., in 2024.

item.title: Indicted terrorist commander allegedly spoke of wanting to target Ivanka Trump

item.dc:creator: Lauren Sausser | KFF Health News
Maia Rosenfeld | KFF Health News
item.description: Within 24 hours of injecting the first dose of a weight loss medication she received following a visit with a telehealth doctor, Karleigh McClain was admitted to the hospital, she said

media:content.media:text: Image: Close-up of a person administering semaglutide injection for weight loss.
media:content.media:description: Close-up image of an individual administering a semaglutide injection into their abdomen for weight loss and obesity management. A personal moment showcasing modern medical solutions for health improvement.

media:content.media:text: The dose the telehealth company prescribed to Karleigh McClain was nearly nine times the amount patients are typically told to take for their first doses.
media:content.media:description: The dose the telehealth company prescribed to Karleigh McClain was nearly nine times the amount patients are typically told to take for their first doses.

item.title: GLP-1 overdoses increase at an alarming rate as weight loss drugs become easier to buy online

item.dc:creator: Phil Helsel
item.description: The bodies of six of nine missing people have been recovered from the site of a chemical tank implosion and rupture in Washington state, officials said Thursday, and efforts were being made to dilute contaminated water

media:content.media:text: A sign for the main gate for the visitor center of Nippon Dynawave
media:content.media:description: Emergency responders in front of the Nippon Dynawave Packaging facility in Longview, Wash., on Tuesday following a fatal chemical storage tank implosion.

item.title: 6 bodies recovered after paper mill implosion as effort to dilute contaminated water is underway

item.dc:creator: Tim Stelloh
Phil Helsel
item.description: Authorities in Hawaii were searching for a suspect described as “extremely dangerous” in connection with the killings of three men on the Big Island this week.

media:content.media:text: A Google Maps screengrab of a rural road in Hawaii.
media:content.media:description: Papaya Farms Road, where Puna patrol officers responded to a residential call and found 69-year-old Robert Shine dead in Pāhoa, Hawaii.

media:content.media:text: Robert Shine, 69, was found dead at a home in Pāhoa, Hawaii, on Tuesday.
media:content.media:description: Robert Shine, 69, was found dead at a home in Pāhoa, Hawaii, on Tuesday.

item.title: ‘Extremely dangerous’ suspect linked to 3 deaths in Hawaii is arrested after manhunt

item.dc:creator: NBC Bay Area staff
item.description: A California mother was sentenced to more than three decades in prison for holding alcohol-fueled, sexualized parties for teens.

media:content.media:text: Shannon O'Connor faces sentencing in Santa Clara County Superior Court on May 28, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Shannon O'Connor faces sentencing Thursday in Santa Clara County Superior Court.

item.title: California mom sentenced to 35 years for throwing alcohol-fueled underage parties

item.dc:creator: Chloe Atkins
Tom Winter
Jonathan Dienst
item.description: Former NBA player Terry Rozier was hit with new federal charges of sports bribery and honest services wire fraud conspiracy in a massive sports betting investigation that has rocked the league.

media:content.media:text: Miami Heat guard Terry Rozier
media:content.media:description: Terry Rozier arrives at U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of New York last year.

item.title: Feds say ex-NBA player Terry Rozier accepted $100K bribe in sports betting scheme

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
Cory Fernandez
Bethany Heitman
item.description: I found the best methods and products for cleaning glasses, including reading glasses, sunglasses and more. Optometrists recommend the best cleaning products.

media:content.media:text: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.
media:content.media:description: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.

media:content.media:text: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.
media:content.media:description: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.

item.title: This is how you should actually be cleaning your glasses

item.dc:creator: Bianca Alvarez
item.description: Bar soaps work as effectively as body washes and I rounded up editor-approved picks from Dove, L’Occitane, Avène and more.

media:content.media:text: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.
media:content.media:description: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.

media:content.media:text: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.
media:content.media:description: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.

item.title: Bar soaps vs. body wash — which is best for your skin?

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Sandals are notoriously not great for lots of walking. These podiatrists-approved sandals have built-in arch support and cushioning to keep you comfortable.

media:content.media:text: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.
media:content.media:description: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.

media:content.media:text: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.
media:content.media:description: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.

item.title: 6 podiatrist-approved sandals to comfortably walk in all summer

item.dc:creator: Harry Rabinowitz
item.description: Shop the best Home Depot Memorial Day sales on tools, appliances, and gardening supplies from Dewalt, Miracle-Gro and LG.

media:content.media:text: Home Depot is a great retailer to shop over Memorial Day weekend if you are looking for tools, home improvement and appliances.
media:content.media:description: Home Depot is a great retailer to shop over Memorial Day weekend if you are looking for tools, home improvement and appliances.

media:content.media:text: Home Depot is a great retailer to shop over Memorial Day weekend if you are looking for tools, home improvement and appliances.
media:content.media:description: Home Depot is a great retailer to shop over Memorial Day weekend if you are looking for tools, home improvement and appliances.

item.title: The 49+ best Home Depot Memorial Day deals start at just $2

item.description: A powerful gas explosion tore through an apartment building in Dallas on Thursday, killing at least three people and sparking a five-alarm fire. An urgent search for the missing is underway. Officials say they believe a contractor was working at the building and struck a gas line, triggering the violent blast. NBC’s Ryan Chandler reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Powerful Gas Explosion in Dallas Apartment Building Kills 3
media:content.media:description: A powerful gas explosion tore through an apartment building in Dallas on Thursday, killing at least three people and sparking a five-alarm fire. An urgent search for the missing is underway. Officials say they believe a contractor was working at the building and struck a gas line, triggering the violent blast. NBC’s Ryan Chandler reports for TODAY.

item.title: Powerful Gas Explosion in Dallas Apartment Building Kills 3

item.dc:creator: Tim Stelloh
Phil Helsel
item.description: Authorities in Hawaii were searching for a suspect described as “extremely dangerous” in connection with the killings of three men on the Big Island this week.

media:content.media:description: Papaya Farms Road, where Puna patrol officers responded to a residential call and found 69-year-old Robert Shine dead in Pāhoa, Hawaii.

media:content.media:text: Robert Shine, 69, was found dead at a home in Pāhoa, Hawaii, on Tuesday.
media:content.media:description: Robert Shine, 69, was found dead at a home in Pāhoa, Hawaii, on Tuesday.

item.title: ‘Extremely dangerous’ suspect linked to 3 deaths in Hawaii is arrested after manhunt
